metadata.description: HerbertGao's self-hosted Claude Code skills marketplace.

plugins.name: review-loop
plugins.description: Adversarial review loop — runs Codex + Code Reviewer + Reality Checker in parallel over your proposal and diff, merges/triages findings, dispatches minimal fixes, and re-reviews until pass (APPROVE/CLEAR) or a configurable round cap.

plugins.name: opsx
plugins.description: Orchestrated OpenSpec apply — the main agent groups pending tasks by scope and dispatches a worker per group (parallel then serial by dependency), only managing OpenSpec state and reviews; it never writes implementation code itself. Ships /opsx:apply-subagent (Claude subagent worker) and /opsx:apply-cursor (cursor-agent worker + one final review-loop), each with its SOT skill.
